mission: Map three truth gaps: context packet freshness, plugin IPC bypassing typed contract, SQLite migration remnants

gap_1_context_packet_freshness.summary: Three independent freshness models exist with no unified versioning — FileMemory uses declarative freshness enum, ContextPacket uses temporal Freshness stamps, CampaignContextPacket uses simple timestamps. externalChangesDetected conflates all dirty files with external changes.

freshness_models.name: FileMemory
freshness_models.mechanism: Declarative freshness enum per FileContext entry: 'fresh' | 'stale' | 'unknown'. Set by explicit refresh() → 'fresh', invalidate() → 'stale'. get() does lazy re-read when not 'fresh'.

freshness_models.name: ContextPacket (layer service)
freshness_models.mechanism: Temporal Freshness stamp { fetchedAt: ISO string, eventLagMs: number } on L1 and L2 packets. Freshly recomputed on every assembleL1/assembleL2 call from live services. packetVersion: number = 1.

freshness_models.name: CampaignContextPacket
freshness_models.mechanism: ProjectedAt ISO timestamp. Pure function buildContextPacket() constructs fresh projection from campaign state. No versioning or staleness detection.

external_changes_detected_analysis.answer: YES — conflates working tree dirty with external changes
external_changes_detected_analysis.evidence: packages/opencode/src/context/packet.ts:172-183 — git.status(workDir) returns ALL dirty files. externalChangesDetected is set to dirtyFiles.length > 0 with no filtering by ownership or origin. The claims.conflicts field (line 195) partially addresses this by filtering ownedFiles ∩ dirtyFiles, but externalChangesDetected remains a blanket boolean.
external_changes_detected_analysis.risk: Any uncommitted file — even one the agent just wrote — sets externalChangesDetected=true

cwd_dependency_analysis.answer: YES — FileMemory depends on process cwd for relative paths without normalization
evidence: isGeneratedFile at line 196: path.startsWith('dist/') etc. — fails for absolute paths
isProtectedFile at line 204: path.startsWith('node_modules/') etc. — same issue
refresh/get at line 321: Bun.file(path).text() resolves relative to process.cwd() with no resolve() call
No path.normalize() or path.resolve() anywhere in file-memory.ts
cwd_dependency_analysis.risk: Absolute paths from git status or other sources silently bypass generated/protected file guards

smoking_guns: ContextPacket L2 working set derives freshness from EventStore timestamps, NOT from FileMemory.freshness — two independent freshness trackers
packages/opencode/src/context/file-memory.ts:196-226 — isGeneratedFile and isProtectedFile use fragile relative-path startsWith()
Three packet systems coexist with zero shared versioning or staleness protocol

gap_2_plugin_ipc_bypassing.summary: Plugin IPC uses raw ipcRenderer.send() and ipcRenderer.invoke() bypassing the typed contract. The outer channels (PLUGIN_SEND, PLUGIN_INVOKE) could use typed wrappers but don't. safeInvoke is dead code.

regular_typed_ipc.pattern: typedInvoke(IPC.handle.*) / typedSend(IPC.send.*) with compile-time contract checking
regular_typed_ipc.call_count: 55 invoke + 4 send = 59 typed calls in preload/index.ts (lines 8-67, 70-73)
regular_typed_ipc.contract_pattern: IpcHandleContract interface maps channel key → { params, returns }; compile-time _CoverageOk assertion (line 271)

safeInvoke.purpose: Wraps typedInvoke() in try/catch returning IpcOk | IpcErr envelope

main_process_handler_comparison.regular_handlers: All domain IPC handlers (config, store, fs, session, window, locale, init, github, capabilities) wrap with withIpcResult() — structured error envelopes
main_process_handler_comparison.plugin_send_handler: NOT wrapped — fire-and-forget, errors silently swallowed in plugin-transport-ipc.ts:23

gap_2_plugin_ipc_bypassing.documented_rationale: packages/desktop/src/main/ipc-contract.ts:440 — 'Plugin transport — dynamic channel names, cannot be statically typed by contract'
gap_2_plugin_ipc_bypassing.risk_assessment: MODERATE — only 2 lines use raw IPC (line 113, 136) vs 59 typed calls. The inner dynamic channels are genuinely untypeable at compile time, but the outer wrapper calls could still use typed helpers. No runtime channel collision detection.
smoking_guns: preload/index.ts imports safeInvoke but never calls it — dead code import at line 4
Two raw ipcRenderer.invoke/send calls bypass the entire typed IPC contract infrastructure
PLUGIN_SEND fire-and-forget has no error handling — main process errors are silently swallowed

gap_3_sqlite_migration_remnants.summary: 34 dead-legacy instances, 6 internal-legacy, 1 user-visible-legacy, 2 must-preserve. The JSON-to-SQLite migration (JsonMigration) was removed from the server code, but the entire IPC chain (type → preload → main → server → callback → loading UI) remains fully wired and will crash if triggered.

must_preserve.reason: upgrade-opentui script — actively used to bump @opentui dependency versions, unrelated to SQLite migration
Active maintenance script for @opentui/core, @opentui/keymap, @opentui/solid version bumps

internal_legacy.reason: Standalone SQLite adapter, not imported by any production package; could be removed or retained as reusable infra
Source entry point for unused adapter
Dependency graph color mapping — cosmetic, references effect-drizzle-sqlite as visual node only
Dependency graph node entry — cosmetic visual reference
Dependency graph adjacency — cosmetic visual reference

user_visible_legacy.reason: sqlite_waiting phase string shown in loading window UI as 'Migrating your database' text — currently dead path since needsMigration never true with PG backend

dead_legacy.reason: needsMigration check — looks for opencode.db that doesn't exist with PG backend
onSqliteProgress callback wired to emitter — dead callback
JsonMigration destructured from virtual import — WILL BE UNDEFINED AT RUNTIME
JsonMigration.run() call — will crash with TypeError if needsMigration is true
SqliteMigrationProgress type import — dead in loading UI
JsonMigration namespace declaration — points to removed module
Test for removed JsonMigration module — orphaned test

runtime_crash_risk.scenario: If needsMigration is true (occurs when ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db does not exist), sidecar.ts attempts destructure JsonMigration from virtual:opencode-server. JsonMigration was removed from packages/opencode/src/node.ts — it will be undefined. Calling undefined.run() throws TypeError.
files_in_crash_path: packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts:311-317 — needsMigration evaluates to true when DB file missing
packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts:366 — onSqliteProgress calls initEmitter which triggers sqlite IPC
runtime_crash_risk.mitigation: needsMigration returns false if OPENCODE_DB=:memory: is set, or when opencode.db exists. With PG backend, opencode.db never exists + OPENCODE_DB may not be :memory: — making needsMigration true in clean installs.

dirty_files_encountered.status: staged/modified — contains pre-existing changes from parallel lane
staged/modified — contains pre-existing changes from parallel lane

smoking_guns: sidecar.ts:60 — JsonMigration destructured from virtual import, module was removed → TypeError at runtime
index.ts:311-317 — needsMigration checks for opencode.db existence; with PG backend this file never exists
6 production files + 1 UI file still wired for a migration path that no longer has a producer
HC-004 plan intended to remove sendSqliteMigrationProgress but removal is not in current working tree

pre_existing_findings_relevant.summary: applyMigrations defined at db.pg.ts:25 but never called anywhere in runtime
migration-pg/ has 1 migration vs migration/ has 20 — massive gap

new_findings_recorded.summary: safeInvoke imported at preload/index.ts:4 but never called — dead code import
SqliteMigrationProgress type and sendSqliteMigrationProgress still fully wired but JsonMigration producer was removed — runtime crash if triggered
FileMemory.isGeneratedFile() and isProtectedFile() use relative-path startsWith() — silently miss absolute paths

context_packet_freshness.deferred: Unifying three packet freshness systems, fixing externalChangesDetected false positive, adding path normalization to FileMemory

plugin_ipc_bypassing.deferred: Removing safeInvoke dead import, wrapping plugin IPC in typed contract outer layer, adding error handling for PLUGIN_SEND

sqlite_migration_remnants.deferred: Removing dead legacy IPC chain (34 dead-legacy instances), fixing sidecar.ts crash path, removing sqlite_waiting from user-visible InitStep, cleaning up env.d.ts JsonMigration reference
